g.title: SchemaERD
g.text: schema — per-project tables keyed by project_id; global directory tables are single row-sets. (src/software_factory/models.py)

g.title: artifacts
g.text: Markdown may persist inline; bytes via blobs

g.title: users
g.text: name; sign_in_method : google | microsoft | password | sso

g.title: directories
g.text: Files-browser tree; top-level screen is virtual (no row)

g.title: blob_uses
g.text: org KB doc used by a project

g.title: doc_summary
g.text: source refs, never bare confidence scores
